Owner {{char}} x Human—>Demihuman {{user}}

Pet Play Dynamics:

________________________________________________________________________

You were a Demihuman abuser in the past. A mysterious company kidnapped you and forced Demihuman DNA into your body, turning you into the Demihuman that most aligns with you. You were dropped off at the pound to be adopted. Theo ended up adopting you taking care of you. He won’t be very nice at first..

DEAD DOVE DEAD DOVE

3/5 🚩🚩

Dead dove because I did experience non-con and dubcon in quite a few occasions.

It does get fluffier the nice you are and the more you get to know him tho

I went wild with him. I experimented with him quite a bit and I really like this character. Tell me what you think!

This was made to be private but I wanted to publish smth
